name: Dairyland Power
description_short: Member-owned credit union in La Crosse, Wisconsin serving employees of Dairyland Power Coop and their families with loans, digital banking, and financial services.
description_long:
Dairyland Power Credit Union (DPCU) was established in 1952 and has been serving the La Crosse, Wisconsin area for over 70 years. As a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution, it operates under NCUA insurance and maintains a focus on providing competitive financial products to a specific membership base centered around Dairyland Power Coop employees and their families.

DPCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial services including auto loans, mortgages, VISA credit cards, and health insurance products. Members have access to a modernized digital banking platform featuring mobile apps for both Android and iPhone, bill pay, eStatements, and mobile deposit capabilities. The credit union also provides fraud protection through SHAZAM Brella alerts and traditional banking services like check ordering and online banking access.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its membership-focused approach and recent technology upgrades. The new digital banking platform represents a significant modernization effort, and the institution emphasizes personalized service with competitive rates on auto loans and mortgages. Their membership eligibility structure creates a defined community, allowing not just direct employees but immediate family members and specific cooperative affiliates to join.

As with all credit unions, membership eligibility restrictions apply and limit who can access services. While DPCU provides competitive products, consumers outside the membership field (Dairyland Power Coop employees and their families) cannot join. The website provides limited detail on specific interest rates, fees, or loan terms, requiring direct contact for pricing information.
services: Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinance
Health insurance products with flexible coverage options
pros: Recently upgraded digital banking platform with Android/iPhone apps, mobile deposits, and bill pay
Long operating history since 1952 with established presence in La Crosse area
NCUA insurance protection for member deposits
Fraud protection through SHAZAM Brella alerts for account monitoring
Competitive auto loan rates with simple, easy-to-understand terms emphasized
Mortgage products available with emphasis on affordability
Extended family membership eligibility includes spouses, children, parents, grandparents, and in-laws
cons: Restrictive membership eligibility limited to Dairyland Power Coop employees and affiliates—most consumers cannot join
Limited fee and interest rate transparency on website; requires direct contact for pricing
No mention of savings account types, CD rates, or deposit product details
Minimal information about loan approval requirements or lending criteria
Small regional institution may have fewer branch locations and services compared to larger credit unions
best_for: Dairyland Power Coop employees and their immediate family members seeking personalized service
Members of DPC Class A & B Cooperatives, WECA, and RESCO organizations
Jump River Electrical Coop end-user customers eligible for membership
diagnosis: DPCU is ideal for current and former employees of Dairyland Power Coop and their immediate families seeking a member-owned credit union with modern digital banking capabilities and competitive loan products. The primary caveat is restrictive membership eligibility—most consumers cannot join unless they have a direct employment or family connection to the qualifying cooperatives or organizations.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
